x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libpwny.a CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/api.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/c2.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/posix_win.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/progname.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/reallocarray.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/setproctitle.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/strlcat.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/strlcpy.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/compat/strtonum.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/core.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/crypt.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/group.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/http_client.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/io.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/log.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/mingw/child.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/misc.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/net_client.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/net_server.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/pipe.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/proc.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/queue.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/tab.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/tabs.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/tlv.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/tunnel.c.obj CMakeFiles/pwny.dir/src/worker.c.obj
/opt/local/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libpwny.a
